Petition To Compel Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho To Account, To Confirm That Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho Is No Longer A Co-Trustee; And For Surcharge
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Continued To Nov-01-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ciarin O'Sullivan appeared by zoom for Eugenia Liontas Keller and Christopher Liontas (Petitioners).
David Rosenbaum appeared by zoom for Anthony Dintcho (Respondent).

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that they have not been able to accomplish mediation, that they have made a proposal, that his Client has been waiting a long time and requested that the matter be set for trial in the fall. Mr. Rosenbaum stated that he agrees with Mr. O' Sullivan and that he thinks the Court can set the matter for trial. The Petition to Compel Co-Trustee to Account, etc. is set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on November 1, 2021 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho To Account, To Confirm That Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho Is No Longer A Co-Trustee; And For Surcharge
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Continued To Feb-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho To Account, To Confirm That Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho Is No Longer A Co-Trustee; And For Surcharge
Off Calendar Jul-20-2020 Continued To Nov-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ciaran O'Sillivan appeared by Zoom for Christopher Liontas and Eugenia Keller.
David Rosenbaum appeared by telephone for Anthony Dintcho.

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that the accounting that was provided by the prior Trustee was inadequate, that Counsel have agreed to engage in the mediation process and requested 120-days to come back. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 2, 2020. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 9, 2020. The Petition to Compel Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho to Account, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on November 16, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Continued To Feb-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho To Account, To Confirm That Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho Is No Longer A Co-Trustee; And For Surcharge
Off Calendar Dec-09-2019 Continued To Jan-27-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho To Account, To Confirm That Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho Is No Longer A Co-Trustee; And For Surcharge
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Continued To Dec-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ciaran O'Sullivan for petitioners.
James Frangos for Nick Liontas (deceased trustee)

Mr. Frangos stated that he told Dr. Dintcho he did not have to appear today because they will be asking for a continuance, they are waiting to get stuff, i.e., excel worksheets to file accounting and finish up with new trustees. Mr. O'Sullivan stated this is a fairly large estate, they have retained forensic accountants, they are finally able to make progress, requested 6 weeks continuance stating matter could be resolved informally. The Court stated Dr. Dintcho and Mr. Frangos must turn over ALL documents within 2 weeks, that it is not up to him to decide if the documents are important, that it is up to Mr. O'Sullivan to decide. Mr. O'Sullivan requested Mr. Frangos to also turn over any trust documents in electronic form. Mr. Frangos stated the counsel will be meeting on October 15th, and he will bring everything, which consists of an old computer and one box.

The Petition to compel Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho to account, etc., is continued to December 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho To Account, To Confirm That Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho Is No Longer A Co-Trustee; And For Surcharge
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Continued To Oct-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ciarin O'Sullivan for Christopher Liontas and Eugenia Liontas (Petitioners).
James Frangos for Nicholas Liontas (deceased Trustee).

Mr. Frangos stated that he submitted papers, but they were rejected because he can not represent a deceased trustee, that he has suggested trying to settle, and that he has documents and that he has turned over some documents. Mr. Frangos also stated that he will assist Counsel with any issues of the limited partnership. Mr. O'Sullivan suggested a 120-day continuance, and asked the Court to order Mr. Frangos to produce all documents within 30-days so that he can do a forensic accounting. The Court orders Mr. Frangos to produce all documents by June 29, 2019. The Petition to Compel Co-Trustees to Account, etc. is continued to October 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho To Account, To Confirm That Co-Trustee Anthony Dintcho Is No Longer A Co-Trustee; And For Surcharge
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Continued To Jun-10-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ciaran O'Sullivan for Christopher Liontas and Gina Keller.
James Frangos for Nick Liontas.
Anthony Dintcho in pro per.

The Court stated that the objections are to be filed by May 6, 2019 and any reply is to be filed by May 27, 2019.

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that Mr. Frangos served objections. Mr. Frangos stated that he had Mr. Dintcho prepare a declaration, that Mr. Dintcho is not the Co-Trustee, and that this situation has put him (Mr. Frangos) in an interesting position. Brief dicussions are held. At the conclusion of the discussions, the Court stated that it could issue an order to turn over the Trust documents. Mr. Frangos stated that the accountant had all of the documents, that the accounting was prepared, and that it has been submitted. Mr. O'Sullivan stated that they need the records transferred to the Successor Trustee.


The matter is continued to June 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Matter not reported.
